findings.name: Root account login detected
findings.description: AWS root account was used to log in. Root should never be used for daily operations.
findings.recommendation: Disable root account console access. Use IAM users with MFA instead.

findings.name: AdministratorAccess policy attached
findings.description: AdministratorAccess policy attached — grants full AWS access.
findings.recommendation: Follow least privilege. Use scoped policies instead of AdministratorAccess.

findings.name: CloudTrail logging stopped
findings.description: CloudTrail logging was stopped — attacker covering tracks.
findings.recommendation: Re-enable CloudTrail immediately. Investigate who stopped it and why.

findings.name: CloudTrail trail deleted
findings.description: CloudTrail trail deleted — severe indicator of attacker covering tracks.
findings.recommendation: Recreate trail immediately. Investigate the actor and timeline.

findings.name: GuardDuty detector disabled or deleted
findings.description: GuardDuty threat detection disabled or deleted.
findings.recommendation: Re-enable GuardDuty immediately. Investigate who disabled it.

findings.name: Config recorder stopped or deleted
findings.description: AWS Config recorder stopped or deleted — compliance monitoring disabled.
findings.recommendation: Re-enable AWS Config. Investigate the actor.

findings.name: S3 bucket policy made public
findings.description: S3 bucket ACL or policy changed to allow public access — data exposure risk.
findings.recommendation: Remove public access immediately. Enable S3 Block Public Access.

findings.name: EBS snapshot shared publicly
findings.description: EBS snapshot shared publicly or with external account.
findings.recommendation: Remove public sharing. Review snapshot contents for sensitive data.

findings.name: RDS snapshot shared externally
findings.description: RDS database snapshot sharing modified — potential data exfiltration.
findings.recommendation: Verify the target account. Restrict snapshot sharing.

findings.name: Security group opened to 0.0.0.0/0
findings.description: Security group rule added allowing traffic from any IP (0.0.0.0/0).
findings.recommendation: Restrict security group rules to specific CIDR ranges.

findings.name: RDS instance or cluster deleted
findings.description: RDS database deleted — potential data destruction.
findings.recommendation: Enable deletion protection on production databases. Verify final snapshots.

findings.name: KMS key scheduled for deletion
findings.description: KMS encryption key scheduled for deletion or disabled — may cause data loss.
findings.recommendation: Cancel key deletion if unauthorised. Review key usage before deletion.

findings.name: Global Administrator role assigned
findings.description: Global Administrator role assigned — highest privilege in Entra ID.
findings.recommendation: Limit Global Admins to 2-4. Use PIM with time-bound assignments.

findings.name: Conditional Access policy disabled or deleted
findings.description: Conditional Access policy modified or deleted — may weaken access controls.
findings.recommendation: Review the policy change. Ensure critical policies are protected.

findings.name: Conditional Access policy disabled or deleted
findings.description: Conditional Access policy modified or deleted — may weaken access controls.
findings.recommendation: Review the policy change. Ensure critical policies are protected.

findings.name: Security Center/Defender setting disabled
findings.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud or Security Center setting modified.
findings.recommendation: Re-enable Defender settings. Investigate the actor.

findings.name: NSG rule allowing any source created
findings.description: Network security group rule created — verify it does not allow unrestricted access.
findings.recommendation: Restrict NSG rules to specific source IPs/ranges.

findings.name: Key Vault key or secret deleted
findings.description: Key Vault secret, key, or certificate deleted.
findings.recommendation: Enable soft delete and purge protection on Key Vaults.

findings.name: IAM policy binding with Owner/Editor role
findings.description: IAM policy binding with Owner or Editor role — highly permissive.
findings.recommendation: Use predefined or custom roles with least privilege.

findings.name: Audit log sink deleted
findings.description: Cloud Logging sink deleted — audit logs may be lost.
findings.recommendation: Recreate the logging sink. Investigate the actor.

findings.name: GCS bucket made public
findings.description: GCS bucket IAM policy changed to allow public access.
findings.recommendation: Remove allUsers/allAuthenticatedUsers. Enable Uniform Bucket-Level Access.

findings.name: Firewall rule allowing 0.0.0.0/0 created
findings.description: Firewall rule created allowing traffic from any IP.
findings.recommendation: Restrict source ranges. Use Identity-Aware Proxy for access.

findings.name: KMS key version destroyed
findings.description: Cloud KMS key version destroyed — encrypted data may become unrecoverable.
findings.recommendation: Review key usage. Enable key version destroy delay.

findings.name: Console login without MFA
findings.description: User logged into AWS console without multi-factor authentication.
findings.recommendation: Enforce MFA for all IAM users with console access.

findings.name: Console login without MFA
findings.description: User logged into AWS console without multi-factor authentication.
findings.recommendation: Enforce MFA for all IAM users with console access.

findings.name: IAM user created
findings.description: New IAM user created — could be a backdoor account.
findings.recommendation: Verify the user creation was authorised. Review the user's permissions.

findings.name: Access key created
findings.description: New IAM access key created — could enable persistent programmatic access.
findings.recommendation: Verify key creation was authorised. Rotate keys regularly.

findings.name: Login profile created (console access added)
findings.description: Console login profile added to an IAM user — grants console access.
findings.recommendation: Verify this was intentional. Ensure MFA is required.

findings.name: Inline policy added to user
findings.description: Inline policy attached directly to IAM user — bypasses group-based controls.
findings.recommendation: Use managed policies attached to groups or roles instead.

findings.name: CloudTrail event selectors modified
findings.description: CloudTrail event selectors modified — may reduce logging coverage.
findings.recommendation: Verify logging configuration includes all management and data events.

findings.name: S3 bucket logging disabled
findings.description: S3 bucket access logging configuration changed.
findings.recommendation: Ensure server access logging is enabled on all sensitive buckets.

findings.name: VPC flow log deleted
findings.description: VPC Flow Logs deleted — network monitoring disabled.
findings.recommendation: Recreate flow logs. Investigate who deleted them.

findings.name: Password policy weakened
findings.description: IAM password policy was modified — may have been weakened.
findings.recommendation: Review password policy. Enforce strong password requirements.

findings.name: EC2 instances terminated in bulk
findings.description: EC2 instances terminated — potential destructive action.
findings.recommendation: Verify the termination was authorised. Enable termination protection on critical instances.

findings.name: S3 bucket deleted
findings.description: S3 bucket deleted — potential data loss.
findings.recommendation: Enable versioning and MFA Delete on critical buckets.

findings.name: Potential cryptominer — large/GPU instance launched
findings.description: Large or GPU-based EC2 instance launched — potential cryptomining.
findings.recommendation: Verify the instance type is justified. Set up billing alerts.

findings.name: Sign-in from unfamiliar location
findings.description: Sign-in detected from an unfamiliar or risky location.
findings.recommendation: Verify with the user. Enable Conditional Access with location-based policies.

findings.name: Sign-in without MFA
findings.description: Successful sign-in without MFA enforcement.
findings.recommendation: Enforce MFA via Conditional Access for all users.

findings.name: Sign-in without MFA
findings.description: Successful sign-in without MFA enforcement.
findings.recommendation: Enforce MFA via Conditional Access for all users.

findings.name: New user or guest account created
findings.description: New user or guest account created in Entra ID.
findings.recommendation: Verify account creation was authorised. Review assigned roles.

findings.name: New user or guest account created
findings.description: New user or guest account created in Entra ID.
findings.recommendation: Verify account creation was authorised. Review assigned roles.

findings.name: Application credentials added
findings.description: Credentials (secret or certificate) added to an application registration.
findings.recommendation: Verify the credential addition. Monitor for unused app credentials.

findings.name: OAuth2 consent grant (admin consent)
findings.description: Admin consent granted to an application — grants persistent API access.
findings.recommendation: Review the application permissions. Use admin consent workflow.

findings.name: Privileged role assigned
findings.description: Privileged directory role assigned to a user or service principal.
findings.recommendation: Verify the role assignment. Use PIM for just-in-time access.

findings.name: Privileged role assigned
findings.description: Privileged directory role assigned to a user or service principal.
findings.recommendation: Verify the role assignment. Use PIM for just-in-time access.

findings.name: Diagnostic setting deleted
findings.description: Azure diagnostic logging setting deleted — audit trail disruption.
findings.recommendation: Re-enable diagnostic settings. Investigate who deleted them.

findings.name: Resource group or resource deleted
findings.description: Azure resource group deleted — potential data destruction.
findings.recommendation: Enable resource locks on critical resources.

findings.name: Service account created
findings.description: New GCP service account created.
findings.recommendation: Verify service account creation. Apply least privilege roles.

findings.name: Service account key created
findings.description: Service account key created — enables persistent API access.
findings.recommendation: Avoid user-managed keys. Use Workload Identity Federation.

findings.name: Firewall rule deleted or modified
findings.description: VPC firewall rule deleted or modified.
findings.recommendation: Verify firewall changes. Use Organisation Policies for guardrails.

findings.name: Project or resource deleted
findings.description: GCP project or compute instance deleted.
findings.recommendation: Enable liens on critical projects. Verify deletion was authorised.

findings.name: Console login failure — possible brute force
findings.description: Failed console login attempt detected. Multiple failures may indicate brute force.
findings.recommendation: Investigate source IP. Enable account lockout and MFA.

findings.name: STS AssumeRole to cross-account role
findings.description: Cross-account role assumption detected.
findings.recommendation: Verify cross-account access is authorised and uses external ID.

findings.name: Secrets Manager secret accessed
findings.description: Secret retrieved from Secrets Manager.
findings.recommendation: Verify the accessor is authorised. Enable secret rotation.

findings.name: SSM Parameter Store sensitive parameter accessed
findings.description: Parameter Store parameter accessed — may contain secrets.
findings.recommendation: Use SecureString type and restrict access via IAM policies.

findings.name: S3 bucket enumeration
findings.description: S3 bucket enumeration detected — attacker mapping storage surface.
findings.recommendation: Review if the caller has legitimate need to list/inspect bucket configurations.

findings.name: S3 bucket enumeration
findings.description: S3 bucket enumeration detected — attacker mapping storage surface.
findings.recommendation: Review if the caller has legitimate need to list/inspect bucket configurations.

findings.name: Security group rule deleted
findings.description: Security group rule removed — may weaken network controls.
findings.recommendation: Verify the rule removal was intentional and does not weaken security posture.

findings.name: API call from unusual region
findings.description: API call made from an unusual or unused AWS region.
findings.recommendation: Investigate if activity is legitimate. Use SCPs to restrict unused regions.

findings.name: VPC or subnet modified
findings.description: VPC or subnet infrastructure modified.
findings.recommendation: Verify network changes are authorised and follow architecture standards.

findings.name: Lambda function created or updated
findings.description: Lambda function created or modified — could be used as a backdoor or for data exfiltration.
findings.recommendation: Review the function code and IAM role for excessive permissions.

findings.name: EC2 key pair created or imported
findings.description: SSH key pair created or imported — enables SSH access to EC2 instances.
findings.recommendation: Verify key pair creation. Use Session Manager instead of SSH keys.

findings.name: Multiple failed sign-in attempts
findings.description: Multiple failed sign-in attempts — possible brute force or credential stuffing.
findings.recommendation: Enable smart lockout. Enforce MFA and Conditional Access.

findings.name: Custom IAM role created
findings.description: Custom IAM role created — verify it follows least privilege.
findings.recommendation: Review custom role permissions for overly broad access.

findings.name: Reconnaissance API calls detected
findings.description: Reconnaissance/enumeration API calls detected.
findings.recommendation: Verify if the caller has a legitimate need for this discovery.

findings.name: Reconnaissance API calls detected
findings.description: Reconnaissance/enumeration API calls detected.
findings.recommendation: Verify if the caller has a legitimate need for this discovery.
